message: I dont know when I are uh exactly going but taking 1april as my deadline date….from today I have one month to spend with you before uh go miles away to shine. I have one month to tell how special u have been to me..i have one month to tell how endlessly I love you. I dont know how will I do it, or whether will you like it or not, but the goal is to just make you feel top of the world and tell you that my whole world ends with you,around you and has only you. Loving you and crushing over you 1% more.
